2604.18179.title: Committed SAE-Feature Traces for Audited-Session Substitution Detection in Hosted LLMs
2604.18179.paper_summary: Hosted-LLM providers have a silent-substitution incentive: advertise a stronger model while serving cheaper replies. Probe-after-return schemes such as SVIP leave a parallel-serve side-channel, since a dishonest provider can route the verifier's probe to the advertised model while serving ordinary users from a substitute. We propose a commit-open protocol that closes this gap. Before any opening request, the provider commits via a Merkle tree to a per-position sparse-autoencoder (SAE) feature-trace sketch of its served output at a published probe layer. A verifier opens random positions, scores them against a public named-circuit probe library calibrated with cross-backend noise, and decides with a fixed-threshold joint-consistency z-score rule. We instantiate the protocol on three backbones -- Qwen3-1.7B, Gemma-2-2B, and a 4.5x scale-up to Gemma-2-9B with a 131k-feature SAE. Of 17 attackers spanning same-family lifts, cross-family substitutes, and rank-<=128 adaptive LoRA, all are rejected at a shared, scale-stable threshold; the same attackers all evade a matched SVIP-style parallel-serve baseline. A white-box end-to-end attack that backpropagates through the frozen SAE encoder does not close the margin, and a feature-forgery attacker that never runs M_hon is bounded in closed form by an intrinsic-dimension argument. Commitment adds <=2.1% to forward-only wall-clock at batch 32.
2604.18179.paper_summary_zh: 託管大型語言模型（Hosted-LLM）提供者有一個隱性替代激勵：在提供較便宜的回覆時廣告宣傳更強大的模型。像SVIP這樣的探測後回應方案留下了一個平行服務的側通道，因為不誠實的提供者可以將驗證者的探測路由到廣告宣傳的模型，同時從替代模型為普通用戶提供服務。我們提出了一個承諾-開放協議來填補這一空白。在任何開放請求之前，提供者通過Merkle樹承諾其在已發布探測層的服務輸出的一個每位置稀疏自動編碼器（SAE）特徵追蹤草圖。驗證者隨機打開位置，將其與經過交叉後端噪聲校準的公共命名電路探測庫進行評分，並根據固定閾值的聯合一致性z-score規則做出決定。我們在三個骨幹上實現了該協議——Qwen3-1.7B、Gemma-2-2B，以及對Gemma-2-9B進行4.5倍擴展的131k特徵SAE。在17個攻擊者中，涵蓋同家族的提升、跨家族的替代品，以及排名<=128的自適應LoRA，所有攻擊者都在一個共享的、穩定的閾值下被拒絕；同樣的攻擊者在匹配的SVIP風格平行服務基準下都逃避了。一個白盒端到端攻擊通過凍結的SAE編碼器反向傳播並未縮小邊際，而一個從不運行M_hon的特徵偽造攻擊者在封閉形式上受到內在維度論證的限制。承諾在批次32的前向時鐘上增加<=2.1%。
2604.18179.author: Ziyang Liu et.al.
